description: Model a 30 km/h traffic calming speed zone on a road segment in the Bologna Acosta scenario and analyze its impact. Using the network file at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/acosta_buslanes.net.xml, identify a traffic-carrying edge and generate baseline trip statistics at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/baseline_tripinfo.xml. Implement a Variable Speed Sign (VSS) that restricts the speed on the chosen lane to 30 km/h (8.33 m/s) starting from time 0, saving this as /home/ga/SUMO_Output/speed_zone.add.xml. Create and run a modified SUMO configuration at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/run_modified.sumocfg that incorporates the speed zone, outputting the results to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/modified_tripinfo.xml. Generate an impact report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/impact_report.txt comparing the baseline and modified scenarios. The report must include the modified edge/lane ID, average trip durations for both scenarios, the percentage change in duration, and the total number of completed trips for each.
